heading: Oath of office
label: 563 Oath of office
text: The Director and each United States marshal and law enforcement officer of the Service, before taking office, shall take an oath or affirmation to faithfully execute the duties of that office.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 563, added , , , specifically stated the oath of office to be taken, prior to repeal by . See .Pub. L. 89–554, § 4(c)80 Stat. 619Pub. L. 100–690, § 7608(a)(1)section 561(h) of this titleSept. 6, 1966
